zh-tw.title: 健身房語錄
zh-tw.description: 獻給每一個在 Smith 機前排隊、被教練說「再一下」的人——精選最有共感的重訓厭世語錄、補劑迷思自嘲、鏡子前的內心小劇場，以及暑假前最誠實的健身房觀察筆記

en.title: Gym Quotes
en.description: For everyone who's queued at the Smith machine and heard 'just one more rep' — the most relatable lifting confessions, supplement-budget self-mockery, mirror-room monologues, and the most honest pre-summer gym-floor observations you'll ever read

items.sourceNote: 健身房三個月成果 + 媽媽否定 + 教練吐槽 三段格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
我重訓三個月了。
媽媽：怎麼看起來還是一樣胖。
教練：那是因為你從來沒去。

會員費跟蛋白粉錢，原來是繳給良心的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 暑假前傳給每週說「明天去健身房」的朋友，他應該還沒換衣服
variations: 更新：第四個月我終於去了，教練說：你是新會員嗎？

en.content:
Three months of lifting.
Mom: You look the same kind of chubby.
Trainer: That's because you've never actually come.

Turns out the membership fee was a guilt tax.
en.editorNote: Send before summer to the friend who keeps saying 'tomorrow I'm going' — they probably haven't changed yet
variations: Update: I finally showed up in month four and the trainer asked if I was a new member.

items.sourceNote: 「健身房鏡子是世界上最嚴格的鏡子」原創角度展開

zh-tw.content:
健身房的鏡子是世界上最嚴格的鏡子。
也是角度最多的。

所以你永遠可以找到一個你不喜歡的自己，
然後再花九十分鐘確認它真的存在。
zh-tw.editorNote: 在你做完核心訓練後當下打開限動，配一張側拍
variations: 結論：我不是來練的，我是來和五個版本的自己內耗的。

en.content:
Gym mirrors are the strictest mirrors in the world.
And the most angled.

Which means you can always find a version of yourself you don't like,
then spend ninety minutes confirming it's real.
en.editorNote: Post on your story right after core day, paired with a candid side shot
variations: Conclusion: I'm not here to train, I'm here to argue with five versions of myself.

items.sourceNote: 補劑預算 vs 廢吃預算 比例對照格式

zh-tw.content:
補劑一個月：6000。
訓練費一個月：1500。
外送跟宵夜一個月：30000。

結論：我不是在練身材，我是在養補劑。它們過得比我還好。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合月底打開帳本後傳給健身房戰友，搭配一張剛收到的蝦皮箱子
variations: 升級版：補劑桌已經比我的健身桌還壯。

en.content:
Supplements: $200 a month.
Training fees: $50 a month.
Late-night takeout: $1000 a month.

Conclusion: I'm not building my body, I'm raising my supplements. They live better than I do.
en.editorNote: Best sent at month-end with a photo of your latest Amazon haul
variations: Update: my supplement shelf is now visibly more jacked than I am.

items.sourceNote: 「練一年體重沒變但衣服變緊」教練 vs 媽媽 雙觀點格式

zh-tw.content:
重訓一年。
體重沒變。
衣服變緊。

教練說：恭喜，這叫進步。
媽媽說：你就是變胖。

我選擇相信收我會員費的那一邊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合配一張過年回家被親戚念的合照
variations: 中年版：第二年衣服繼續變緊，教練改口說：你該換衣服了。

en.content:
One year of lifting.
Weight: unchanged.
Shirts: tighter.

Trainer: Congrats, that's progress.
Mom: You just got fat.

I choose to believe the one collecting my membership fee.
en.editorNote: Pairs perfectly with a Lunar New Year family photo where your aunt commented
variations: Year two: shirts still tightening, trainer now says I 'need to size up'.

items.sourceNote: Smith 機 vs 啞鈴區 空間政治 觀察笑話

zh-tw.content:
Smith 機前面：永遠排隊。
啞鈴區地上：永遠沒人收。
滑輪下拉旁邊：永遠有人滑手機坐三十分鐘。

健身房不是運動空間，是大型行為藝術展。
而我就是長期觀察員。
zh-tw.editorNote: 尖峰時段在跑步機上偷拍背影限動用
variations: 備註：身為觀察員的代價是，我也從來沒收過啞鈴。

en.content:
Smith machine: line of six.
Dumbbell racks: a graveyard of orphans.
Lat pulldown bench: someone scrolling for thirty minutes.

The gym isn't a fitness facility. It's a long-running performance art exhibit.
And I'm just the resident critic.
en.editorNote: Best used during 6pm peak hour with a stealth shot from the treadmill
variations: Disclosure: as the critic, I have also never re-racked a dumbbell.

items.sourceNote: 「再一下」教練 vs 學員 期望落差 格式

zh-tw.content:
教練說「再一下」的時候，
指的不是再一下，
是再五下、再一組、加重、加組數，
然後說「下次我們再加一點」。

「下次」這兩個字，是健身房裡最危險的詞。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合做完腿之後癱在地上時發限動
variations: 翻譯小辭典：教練說「很輕」＝你之後三天爬不了樓梯。

en.content:
When my trainer says 'one more',
he doesn't mean one more.
He means five more, then another set, then more weight,
then 'we'll add a little next time'.

'Next time' is the most dangerous phrase in the gym.
en.editorNote: Post-leg-day, posted from the floor
variations: Glossary: 'this is light' means you won't take stairs for three days.

items.sourceNote: 練胸日 / 練腿日 / 休息日 三段反差結構

zh-tw.content:
練胸日：人很多，我很爽。
練腿日：人很少，我很累。
休息日：人最多的是我外送的餐點。

所謂一週分化，是把痛苦平均分散到七天。
zh-tw.editorNote: 週日晚上整理下週課表時，順手傳給健身房群組
variations: 進階版：練背日永遠卡課，因為我從來找不到自己的背。

en.content:
Chest day: crowded, glorious.
Leg day: empty, brutal.
Rest day: my delivery driver works overtime.

A split routine is just pain spread evenly across seven days.
en.editorNote: Send to the gym group chat on Sunday night while planning the week
variations: Advanced version: back day always gets skipped because I can't locate my own back.

items.sourceNote: 「健身使我快落」反諷 register — 訓練後真實狀態 對比

zh-tw.content:
貼文：「健身使我快落，揮汗如雨真療癒。」

配圖：剛訓練完，半癱在地，水壺翻倒，毛巾濕成一團，腿在抖。

快樂的部分，是我終於可以坐下了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合做完高強度訓練後直接發限動，文案越燦爛照片越誠實越好
variations: 後續：朋友按愛心問我是不是哭了。我說那是汗，但其實兩者都有。

en.content:
Caption: 'Working out makes me so happy, sweat is therapy.'

Photo: post-set collapse on the floor, water bottle tipped over, towel soaked, legs trembling.

The happy part is that I finally get to sit down.
en.editorNote: Best deployed right after a brutal session — the more glowing the caption, the more honest the photo should be
variations: Follow-up: a friend asked if I was crying. I said it was sweat. (It was both.)

items.sourceNote: 蛋白粉迷思 vs 雞胸肉現實 對比格式

zh-tw.content:
我以為我會因為蛋白粉變強。
後來才知道，
讓人變強的是雞胸肉、睡覺、跟不要每三天放棄。

蛋白粉只是讓我心安理得地多吃一頓早餐。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在 IG 配一張早餐有兩顆蛋一個地瓜的照片
variations: 進階心得：第二罐喝完才發現，我的弱點不是蛋白質，是意志力。

en.content:
I thought protein powder would make me strong.
Turns out what makes you strong is chicken breast, sleep, and not quitting every three days.

Protein powder just lets me eat a second breakfast guilt-free.
en.editorNote: Best paired with an IG shot of two eggs, oatmeal, and a sweet potato
variations: Lesson learned by tub two: my weak link wasn't protein. It was discipline.

items.sourceNote: 健身愛好者自我推銷 = CrossFit 經典梗 在地化

zh-tw.content:
怎麼知道一個人有在健身？
別擔心，他會自己跟你說。
第一次見面說、開會中說、結婚喜宴上也說。

如果他沒說，那不是他沒在練，是他剛吃完，沒力氣講。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合健身房群組裡有同事新加入時拋一句調侃
variations: 備註：本人經多年驗證，是同一種人。

en.content:
How do you spot someone who lifts?
Don't worry. They'll tell you.
First date, team meeting, their cousin's wedding.

If they don't, it's not that they don't train. They just ate, and they're too tired to talk.
en.editorNote: Drop into the gym group chat when a coworker just joined
variations: Disclosure: years of testing confirm I am exactly this person.

items.sourceNote: 「明天開始」 拖延文化 在地化 重訓 register

zh-tw.content:
我從春天開始說要練夏天的身材。
夏天到了，我說要練秋天的。
秋天到了，我說反正穿很多。
冬天到了，我說過完年再來。

我練的不是身材，是季節輪替的耐受力。
zh-tw.editorNote: 暑假前一週傳給每年都在「下個月開始」的朋友
variations: 結論：我的身材跟我一樣，四季如一。

en.content:
In spring I said I'd build a summer body.
In summer I said I'd build an autumn one.
In autumn I said the layers will cover it.
In winter I said after New Year.

I'm not building a body. I'm building tolerance for the changing seasons.
en.editorNote: Send a week before summer to the friend who's started 'next month' for three years
variations: Conclusion: my body, like me, stays the same all four seasons.

items.sourceNote: 「練完吃更多」熱量赤字反諷 在地化

zh-tw.content:
教練說：練完一定要補蛋白質。
我說：好。

於是我練了五百大卡，補了一千八百大卡，
還順便補了一杯珍奶，因為練完當然要喝。

熱量赤字赤了個寂寞。
zh-tw.editorNote: 練完當天晚上點消夜時自動觸發的內心 OS
variations: 教練後續：那不叫補蛋白質，那叫慶功宴。

en.content:
Trainer: Refuel with protein after training.
Me: Got it.

So I burned 500 calories, refueled with 1,800,
and threw in a milk tea because earned-it logic.

Calorie deficit was achieved, in spirit only.
en.editorNote: Internal monologue when ordering late-night snacks post-workout
variations: Trainer's follow-up: that's not refueling, that's a victory dinner.

items.sourceNote: 「再三組就好」教練 vs 體感 對比 register

zh-tw.content:
「再三組就好」——教練講的時候，語氣像是在點奶茶。

做到第二組，我已經在心裡幫自己寫遺囑。
做完第三組，我發現遺囑漏了健身房會員費的退款條款。

教練微笑：很棒，下次加重。
zh-tw.editorNote: 尤其適合做完深蹲後的限動，配一張電梯按鈕的特寫
variations: 後續：第四組是教練給的小驚喜，他叫它『熱身完成』。

en.content:
'Just three more sets' — said in the tone of ordering boba.

By set two, I'm drafting my will.
By set three, I realize I forgot to mention the gym refund clause.

Trainer smiles: Great. We'll go heavier next time.
en.editorNote: Perfect for a post-squat story, paired with a close-up of the elevator button
variations: Bonus: a fourth set he called 'finishing the warm-up'.

items.sourceNote: 「休息也是訓練的一部分」合理化 register

zh-tw.content:
他們說：休息也是訓練的一部分。

所以我這週，認真休息了五天，
非常用力地不練了兩天，
然後在週日深度休息了一整天。

本週訓練完成度：100%。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合週日晚上回顧週計畫時，配一張遙控器跟泡麵的合照
variations: 進階版：下週我要挑戰連續休息七天的進階課表。

en.content:
They say rest is part of training.

So this week I rested seriously for five days,
intensely did not lift for two,
and on Sunday I rested at an advanced level.

Weekly training completion: 100%.
en.editorNote: Best on a Sunday night while reviewing your weekly plan, paired with a remote-and-ramen flat lay
variations: Next week's challenge: a full seven-day rest cycle.

items.sourceNote: 「身體 ego vs 鏡子 ego」內心戲 register

zh-tw.content:
在健身房，我有兩個自我。

一個說：今天輕一點，受傷划不來。
另一個說：旁邊那個人在看，加重。

結果是，我加了重，受傷了，而對方根本沒在看我。
他在看自己。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在等鎖匙櫃時順手發限動，搭配剛拉傷的肩膀照
variations: 結論：健身房沒有觀眾，只有同事業的演員。

en.content:
At the gym, I have two selves.

One says: Go light today, an injury isn't worth it.
The other says: That guy is watching. Load up.

Result: I loaded up, I got hurt, and that guy wasn't watching me.
He was watching himself.
en.editorNote: Story-worthy while waiting at the locker, paired with a freshly tweaked shoulder
variations: Conclusion: the gym has no audience. Only fellow performers.

items.sourceNote: 跑步機 vs 操場 體感落差 在地化

zh-tw.content:
跑步機上跑六公里：氣不喘、心情好、邊看 Netflix。
操場上跑兩公里：感覺人生在跟我告別。

結論：我練的不是體能，是冷氣跟 Wi-Fi。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合夏天剛從室外跑回來、癱在健身房門口時發限動
variations: 進階版：跑步機壞掉那天，我也跟著壞掉了。

en.content:
Six km on the treadmill: easy breathing, good mood, mid-Netflix episode.
Two km on an outdoor track: my life is flashing before my eyes.

Conclusion: I'm not training cardio. I'm training AC and Wi-Fi.
en.editorNote: Best deployed after stumbling back from an outdoor run, collapsed at the gym entrance
variations: Update: the day the treadmill broke, so did I.

items.sourceNote: pre-workout 過量 心悸 register 在地化

zh-tw.content:
教練說：一匙就夠。
我：一匙看起來很少。

二十分鐘後，我在更衣室裡，
心跳像在打鼓，手在抖，眼睛瞪得很大，
而我還沒開始熱身。

那天我練得很弱，但我活得很用力。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合 pre-workout 過量當下，蹲在置物櫃前自拍時用
variations: 後續：教練說『下次照劑量』，我說我下次會記得。下次。

en.content:
Trainer: One scoop is plenty.
Me: One scoop looks like nothing.

Twenty minutes later in the locker room,
heart pounding, hands shaking, eyes wide,
and I haven't even warmed up.

I lifted weak that day. But I lived loud.
en.editorNote: Use right after over-scooping, while crouched in front of your locker
variations: Follow-up: trainer said 'follow the label next time'. I said sure. Next time.

items.sourceNote: DOMS 延遲性痠痛 第二天 vs 第三天 在地化

zh-tw.content:
練腿當天：哇我超強，我可以再加重。
第二天：還行，只是上下樓梯有點怪。
第三天：馬桶是我的敵人，沙發是我的監獄，襪子穿不起來。

結論：痛苦不會準時來，但一定會來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合練腿後第三天早上，坐在馬桶上時的限動文案
variations: 進階版：第四天我終於可以蹲下，然後我馬上預約下次練腿。為什麼。

en.content:
Leg day: I'm a god, I should've gone heavier.
Day two: I'm fine, stairs just feel weird.
Day three: the toilet is my enemy, the couch is my prison, and socks are now optional.

Conclusion: the pain is never on time, but it always shows up.
en.editorNote: Best posted on the morning of day three, captioned from the toilet
variations: Day four: I can finally squat down. So naturally, I book another leg day. Why.

items.sourceNote: PR 紀錄 vs 限動發文 比例 反諷 register

zh-tw.content:
破 PR 那一下：三秒。
喘到不能講話：五分鐘。
錄影、剪片、加慢動作、配音樂、上字幕：四十分鐘。
選 hashtag、想文案、猶豫要不要 @ 教練：兩小時。

那一下到底是為了破紀錄，還是為了發限動，我自己都不確定。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在剛剪完 PR 影片、限動還沒按發布前的最後一秒掙扎時用
variations: 結論：我練的是肌肉，但我經營的是內容。

en.content:
The PR rep: three seconds.
Catching my breath: five minutes.
Filming, editing, slow-mo, music, captions: forty minutes.
Picking hashtags, drafting the caption, debating whether to tag my coach: two hours.

Was that rep for the record, or for the story? I genuinely don't know anymore.
en.editorNote: Best at the exact moment before you hit 'post' on the freshly cut PR reel
variations: Conclusion: I train muscles. But I run a content business.

items.sourceNote: 硬舉 = 脊椎透支 反諷 register 在地化

zh-tw.content:
硬舉那一下，我聽見自己的脊椎在跟我談判：

「你最多再來兩下，第三下我就要罷工。」
我說：「再一組就好。」
它說：「那你下週去找復健科。」

結果我加了重，它說：「掰，下個月見。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合硬舉日結束、躺在地墊上滑手機時的限動文案
variations: 備註：我的脊椎跟我之間，是一段長期的勞資爭議。
後續：教練說『腰是用來代償的』。我說『代償也要先有本金』。

en.content:
Mid-deadlift, I heard my spine negotiating with me:

'You get two more reps. Third one, I strike.'
I said, 'Just one more set.'
It said, 'Then you're seeing a chiropractor next week.'

I added weight anyway. It said, 'Bye. See you next month.'
en.editorNote: Best posted while lying on the mat after deadlift day, scrolling on your phone
variations: Note: my spine and I are in an ongoing labor dispute.
Trainer said 'your back will compensate'. I said 'compensation requires equity'.

items.sourceNote: Gym bro 戴耳機四十分鐘 vs 真正組數 反差 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我在健身房戴耳機的時間：90 分鐘。
認真訓練的時間：20 分鐘。
換歌、滑歌單、調音量、找一首夠燃的：35 分鐘。
看著鏡子等那首歌進高潮：剩下全部。

我不是來練的，我是來辦一場個人演唱會。觀眾只有我自己。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合戴著耳機走出健身房、汗只有一點點時發限動
variations: 結論：我的播放清單比我的訓練菜單還認真。
進階版：今天歌單沒做好，整場訓練都不對。

en.content:
Time spent wearing headphones at the gym: 90 minutes.
Time spent actually lifting: 20 minutes.
Skipping tracks, scrolling playlists, adjusting volume, hunting for a song that hits: 35 minutes.
Staring in the mirror waiting for the drop: the rest.

I'm not training. I'm performing a one-man concert. Audience of one.
en.editorNote: Post while walking out of the gym, headphones still in, barely sweating
variations: Conclusion: my playlist takes more effort than my program.
Bad playlist day, bad training day. There's a correlation.

items.sourceNote: 臥推報數 vs 真實重量 灌水 register 在地化

zh-tw.content:
別人問我臥推幾公斤：

當天最重那組：報。
做完馬上掉重那組：跳過。
只完成一下、輔助手插了一半：四捨五入往上加。
上次練的那次：也算我現在的。

結論：我的臥推紀錄是浮動匯率，不是公斤數。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在群組裡有人問「你現在臥推多少」之前先發制人
variations: 備註：問我深蹲也一樣，請參考國際匯率公告。
翻譯：我說一百，意思是上次八十、輔助一半、然後我選擇相信自己。

en.content:
When someone asks my bench:

The heaviest set of the day: counts.
The set I dropped right after: skipped.
The one-rep with half a spotter: rounded up generously.
Last week's PR: also counts as today's.

My bench number isn't a weight. It's a floating exchange rate.
en.editorNote: Use preemptively before someone in the group chat asks 'so what's your bench now?'
variations: Note: same conversion applies to squat. Consult the daily forex board.
Translation: I said 225. Meaning 185 last week, with a spotter, and a generous belief in myself.

items.sourceNote: 健身房水壺 = 身份證 in-group 觀察 在地化

zh-tw.content:
健身房裡，水壺就是身份證。

一公升塑膠：新手。
兩公升搖搖杯+量匙：中階。
一加侖透明水壺、貼名字、附吸管：核心會員。
沒帶水壺、只喝飲水機：你來幹嘛的？

我升級水壺那天，比我加重那天還隆重。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛買新水壺的隔天，配一張水壺擺在槓片上的合照
variations: 進階版：我水壺比我背包還貴，但我覺得很合理。
備註：水壺貼名字是健身房成年禮。

en.content:
At the gym, your water bottle is your ID.

1L plastic: rookie.
2L shaker with scoop: intermediate.
Gallon jug, name labeled, straw included: core member.
No bottle, drinking from the fountain: why are you here?

The day I upgraded my bottle was more ceremonial than the day I added weight.
en.editorNote: Best the day after a new bottle drop, paired with a flat lay on top of a plate
variations: Advanced: my water bottle costs more than my backpack. I stand by it.
Note: labeling your jug is the gym's coming-of-age ritual.
